architecture.summary: Two targeted fixes in existing files: statSync guard in plugin-copier.ts, sudo-aware retry in update.ts. No new modules or architectural changes. Add isNpmGlobalWritable() helper in update.ts.

integrations.summary: No new integrations. Existing npm CLI integration via execSync. Sudo retry uses same buildPublicRegistryEnv() and npmRegistryFlag(). stdio changes from pipe to inherit only for sudo path.

ui-ux.summary: Spinner shows 'Retrying with sudo...' before elevated retry. Error messages change from 'sudo npm install -g specweave@latest' to 'sudo specweave update'. EISDIR debug noise eliminated.

performance.summary: No performance impact. statSync with throwIfNoEntry:false is same perf as try/catch. Writable check via fs.accessSync is a single syscall. Sudo retry only triggers on EACCES failure path.

security.summary: sudo is only invoked for npm install -g specweave@version with clean env via buildPublicRegistryEnv(). No arbitrary command injection possible — command string is constructed from validated version. stdio:inherit lets user see and control the sudo prompt.

edge-cases.summary: Windows: skip sudo detection entirely, suggest Run as Administrator. nvm/volta users: prefix is user-writable, no sudo attempted. sudo not installed: EACCES error with clear message. Password prompt timeout/cancel: inherits default sudo behavior, EACCES error shown. ETARGET fallback: sudo retry applies to fallback install too.
